description: User clicks the screen sharing button as instructed by the on-screen text.
frame_description: The screen displays instructions to share the window, which changes to a success message after the interaction.

description: The instruction text updates to reveal more details about the upcoming task.
frame_description: Text on screen expands from 'Now I'm going' to 'Now I'm going to show you a prototype with new filtering'.

description: The instruction text continues to reveal the task scenario.
frame_description: Text updates to include 'explore the prototype to f'.

description: The instruction text reveals the full task description and testing reminders.
frame_description: The text block expands significantly to explain the scenario and the 'think aloud' protocol.

description: The screen transitions to a new set of instructions focusing on the 'think aloud' process.
frame_description: The previous task description is replaced by instructions to share thoughts while working.

description: The screen transitions to the final instruction before opening the prototype website.
frame_description: The text changes to inform the user that the website will be opened in their browser.
